name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: six skills — plugin-dev (a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace: repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, what makes a plugin/skill worth installing), skill-authoring (how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean, portable across Claude Code and Codex), marketplace-health (check that an installed marketplace is on the latest version and auto-updating, on either host), enable-autoupdate (keep it current — Claude Code and Codex), clone-marketplace (bootstrap a new marketplace, or update an existing one's meta plugin, from the latest on GitHub), and install-bun (install the Bun runtime the marketplace's Bun + TypeScript scripts and hook require) — plus a SessionStart hook (Claude Code + Codex) that flags at session start only when the marketplace's auto-update is off. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.

interface.shortDescription: How to build a great skills marketplace + plugins
interface.longDescription: The meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace — the tooling for building the marketplace itself and the skills in it. plugin-dev: a prescriptive guide to a great skills marketplace (repo layout, the Claude .claude-plugin + Codex .agents/.codex-plugin dual-manifest packaging, the version-bump discipline the auto-update keys off). skill-authoring: how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean. marketplace-health: diagnose an installed marketplace — is the latest plugin version installed, and is auto-update enabled — on Claude Code or Codex. enable-autoupdate: the action counterpart to marketplace-health — keep the marketplace current on either host. clone-marketplace: bootstrap a new marketplace repo (or update an existing one's meta plugin + structure) from the canonical learn-yy-skills, always fetched from GitHub at the latest version. install-bun: install the Bun runtime that this marketplace's Bun + TypeScript scripts and its SessionStart hook require. It also ships a cross-host SessionStart hook (Claude Code + Codex) that speaks at session start only when the marketplace's auto-update is off. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up a skills marketplace like this one
How should I structure a Claude + Codex plugin?
